title: Build Systems, Not Code - Angie Jones, Agentic AI Foundation
summary: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents shift software engineering from code-level to system-level work, preserving engineering discipline through decomposition, state management, and systems thinking. The talk contends that developers retain craft and flow state by designing agentic systems rather than writing code directly.
